dialogue.note: 人声清晰度最高优先级

music.note: 不干扰对白的前提下烘托情绪

sfx_hard.note: 硬音效与画面动作精确同步

hope_rising.music: major key ascending melody, strings swell

melancholy_reflection.music: solo piano or cello, slow tempo minor

terror_sudden.music: cut to silence or sharp sting

christopher_nolan.hint: massive low-frequency impact, minimal dialogue in action sequences

denis_villeneuve.hint: sustained synthesizer pads, sound as architecture not decoration

wes_anderson.hint: percussive precision, music as narrative punctuation mark

david_fincher.trait: Trent Reznor & Atticus Ross electronic textures
david_fincher.hint: industrial ambient, sound design blurs into score

greta_gerwig.hint: diegetic music as character expression, dance sequences
